_comment: Event dates for recurring conferences are approximate/typical timing and should be verified on the official event website before relying on them.

items.name: ITB Berlin 2026
items.description: ITB Berlin is the world's leading travel trade show, bringing together tour operators, DMOs, airlines, hoteliers and travel technology providers from around the globe. The event includes the ITB Convention, a large B2B exhibition floor, and a dedicated digital/travel tech program.

items.name: HITEC 2026
items.description: HITEC is billed as the world's largest and longest-running hospitality technology event, bringing together hundreds of exhibitors covering PMS, revenue management, guest experience and hotel operations software. It runs alongside HSMAI's Commercial Strategy Conference.

items.name: The Phocuswright Conference 2026
items.description: The Phocuswright Conference is a leading gathering for travel industry executives, investors and technology leaders to discuss trends in online travel, distribution and emerging technology. The 2026 edition takes place at the fully renovated Diplomat Beach Resort.

items.name: World Travel Market (WTM) London 2026
items.description: World Travel Market London is a major global marketplace for travel professionals to source new products, meet buyers and discuss distribution and technology trends. The event draws tens of thousands of visitors and thousands of exhibitors from across the travel industry.

items.name: Arabian Travel Market (ATM) 2026
items.description: Arabian Travel Market is a leading global event for the travel and tourism industry in the Middle East, connecting buyers and sellers across hospitality, aviation and travel technology. The 2026 edition was rescheduled from its original spring dates to September.

items.name: IMEX America 2026
items.description: IMEX America is the largest trade show for the global meetings, events and incentive travel (MICE) industry, gathering thousands of suppliers and qualified buyers for education and networking.

items.name: ITB Asia 2026
items.description: ITB Asia is Asia's largest B2B travel trade show, connecting travel technology providers, tour operators, airlines and MICE professionals across the Asia-Pacific region.

items.name: Business Travel Show Europe 2026
items.description: Business Travel Show Europe is the continent's leading annual event for corporate travel and meetings professionals, co-located with TravelTech Show and The Meetings Show at ExCeL London.

items.name: GBTA Convention 2026
items.description: The GBTA Convention is one of the largest annual gatherings for the global business travel industry, featuring expert-led sessions on corporate travel management, expense and travel technology.

items.name: Routes World 2026
items.description: Routes World is a leading route development forum uniting airlines, airports and destinations for bilateral meetings on new air service agreements and network growth.

items.name: Skift Global Forum 2026
items.description: Skift Global Forum is a flagship travel industry event bringing together executives from airlines, hotels, OTAs and travel technology companies to discuss trends shaping the future of travel.

items.name: HSMAI Commercial Strategy Conference 2026
items.host: Hospitality Sales and Marketing Association International (HSMAI Americas)
items.description: The HSMAI Commercial Strategy Conference brings together hotel marketing, revenue management, sales and distribution professionals to explore the convergence of commercial disciplines, held in conjunction with HITEC.

items.name: TravelTech Show 2026
items.description: TravelTech Show (formerly Travel Technology Europe) is a technology-focused event bringing together travel technology suppliers, TMCs, tour operators, OTAs, airlines and hotels to source solutions across AI, distribution, CRM and booking systems.

items.name: WTTC Global Summit 2026
items.description: The WTTC Global Summit is the flagship annual gathering of the World Travel & Tourism Council, uniting public and private sector leaders to address innovation, resilience, sustainability and growth in travel and tourism.
items.audience: Travel & tourism industry leaders and policymakers

items.name: World Travel Awards 2026 Grand Final Gala Ceremony
items.description: The World Travel Awards Grand Final is the climax of the annual World Travel Awards Grand Tour, recognizing excellence across airlines, hotels, tour operators and travel technology companies worldwide.

items.name: The Hotel Show 2026
items.description: The Hotel Show is a major hospitality trade show in the Middle East covering hotel design, technology, F&B and operations, co-located with INDEX and WORKSPACE at Dubai Exhibition Centre.
items.venue: Dubai Exhibition Centre, Expo City Dubai

items.name: TravelCon 2026
items.description: TravelCon is a business event for travel content creators, connecting influencers with brands, tourism boards and DMOs through masterclasses, networking and one-on-one meetings. The 2026 edition is fully integrated with the Travel, Gear & Adventure Show.

items.name: Seatrade Cruise Global 2026
items.description: Seatrade Cruise Global is the leading global cruise industry event, bringing together cruise line executives, ports, destinations and technology suppliers. The 2026 edition was the largest in the event's 41-year history.

items.name: IATA 82nd Annual General Meeting & World Air Transport Summit
items.description: The IATA AGM and World Air Transport Summit is the airline industry's premier annual event, gathering airline CEOs and aviation leaders to discuss distribution, sustainability and industry policy. The 82nd edition was hosted by LATAM Airlines Group.

items.name: Phocuswright Europe 2026
items.description: Phocuswright Europe is the premier travel technology and industry conference for the European market, covering distribution, OTAs, hotel tech and emerging travel innovation.

items.name: Skift Global Forum East 2026
items.description: Skift Global Forum East brings Skift's flagship travel industry conference format to the Middle East, convening regional travel, tourism and hospitality leaders to discuss growth and technology trends.
